NOTIFICA11ON New Delh‾ the 23rd May, 2003 G.S.R. 429(E).-1n exercise of powers conferred by Section 24, read with Section 5 of the Passports Act, 1967 (15 of1967), the Central Government hereby makes the followingrqlesfo further amend the Passports Rules, 1980. namely:- ' I. (I) These rules may be called the ‾ports (Amendment) Rules, 2003. (2) They shall come into force with effect from on the date ofthier publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In Schedule IV to the Passports Rules, 1980,- (a) Serial number 23 has been deleted, as it has been decided no{t'o charge additional fee under the 'Tatkal Scheme' for rendering any miscellaneous services-to existing passport holders in continuation of or on their valid passports.
